    'hand_001.json': ["1D","1D","2D","2D","3D","3D","4B","4B","5B","5B","6B","6B","7C"],
    'hand_002.json': ["1D","9D","1B","9B","1C","9C","East","South","West","North","Red","Green","White"],
    'hand_003.json': ["1D","3D","5D","7D","9D","2B","4B","6B","8B","1C","3C","5C","7C"],
    'hand_004.json': ["1D","1D","9D","9D","1B","1B","9B","9B","East","East","South","South","West"],
